embeds.description:
The Hermes→Claude dispatch bridge is not configured.

Set these env vars on Railway (or in `.env` locally):
```
CLAUDE_ROUTINE_FIRE_URL=https://api.anthropic.com/v1/claude_code/routines/<id>/fire
CLAUDE_ROUTINE_TOKEN=sk-ant-oat01-…
CLAUDE_ROUTINE_BETA=experimental-cc-routine-2026-04-01
CLAUDE_ROUTINE_VERSION=2023-06-01
```
See `docs/operations/hermes-dispatch-bridge.md` for the full setup runbook.
embeds.title: Hermes bridge not configured
